name: cmas-sms-consent-handler
description: Compassscribe — SMS consent handler (Lambda) for Twilio toll-free verification

scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=8788 DYNAMODB_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:8100 SMS_CONSENT_TABLE=cmas-sms-consent ALLOWED_ORIGIN=* AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=local AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=local AWS_REGION=us-east-1 node local-server.mjs
